compare-specific-page-range-of-two-pdfs.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-specific-page-range-of-two-pdfs.description: Loads two PDF files, sets a start and end page, and uses Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to detect text differences on each page within the selected range, outputting a simple report.

compare-pdfs-page-by-page-diff.title: Compare PDFs Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-page-by-page-diff.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting diff PDF.

compare-selected-pdf-pages-side-by-side.title: Compare Selected PDF Pages Side‑by‑Side
compare-selected-pdf-pages-side-by-side.description: Demonstrates how to compare specific pages of two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf by extracting the desired pages and performing a side‑by‑side comparison.

exclude-areas-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Specific Areas in PDF Side‑by‑Side Comparison
exclude-areas-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to define rectangular regions to exclude from each PDF and perform a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to gather annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and exclude those areas during a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Regions
compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.description: Demonstrates how to perform a side‑by‑side PDF comparison with Aspose.Pdf while excluding footers by defining rectangular exclude areas for each document.

compare-pdfs-case-insensitive.title: Compare PDFs with Case‑Insensitive Text Comparison
compare-pdfs-case-insensitive.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf while attempting to ignore case differences by setting the ComparisonOptions.IgnoreCase property via reflection.

set-custom-tolerance-pdf-image-compariso.title: Set Custom Tolerance for PDF Image Comparison
set-custom-tolerance-pdf-image-compariso.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs that contain scanned images using Aspose.Pdf while applying a custom similarity tolerance to ignore minor differences.

compare-pdf-form-fields-diff.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
compare-pdf-form-fields-diff.description: Loads two PDF documents, sets ComparisonOptions to include form field values, and generates a diff PDF using TextPdfComparer.

compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and exclude the rectangular areas of digital signature fields so that signature regions are treated as unchanged.

compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes Side‑by‑Side
compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that have different page dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison, producing a result PDF that aligns the content automatically.

compare-pdf-text-compression.title: Compare PDF Text with Different Compression Settings
compare-pdf-text-compression.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs that have identical logical content but different compression, using Aspose.Pdf's text comparison to ignore compression differences.

compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.title: Detect Unicode Text Differences Between PDFs
compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.description: Loads two PDF files with different language encodings, performs a flat text comparison using Aspose.Pdf's Comparison API, and saves a PDF highlighting the differences while listing the detected text changes.

compare-pdfs-detect-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
compare-pdfs-detect-font-differences.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, generate a visual diff PDF, and count font‑related diff operations reported as separate DiffOperation items.

compare-encrypted-pdfs-with-passwords.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Passwords
compare-encrypted-pdfs-with-passwords.description: Shows how to open password‑protected PDF files and compare them using flat text and side‑by‑side visual comparison with Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-from-streams-to-diff-stream.title: Compare PDFs from Streams and Write Diff to Stream
compare-pdfs-from-streams-to-diff-stream.description: Demonstrates loading two PDF files from in‑memory streams, comparing them page‑by‑page with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.GraphicalPdfComparer, and saving the visual diff PDF to another memory stream without using temporary files.

generate-visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-visual-diff-pdf.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents visually and produce a diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

extract-image-differences-between-pdfs.title: Extract Image Differences Between Two PDFs
extract-image-differences-between-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to compare pages of two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's graphical comparer and save visual difference images for each page.

generate-diff-pdf-compare-documents.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two Documents
generate-diff-pdf-compare-documents.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf and create a diff PDF using GraphicalPdfComparer.

generate-diff-pdf-with-highlighted-chang.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes
generate-diff-pdf-with-highlighted-chang.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs page‑by‑page, creating a diff PDF with default red/green highlights for deletions and insertions, and verifying the annotation colors.

generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.description: This example compares two PDF documents page by page, enumerates text differences, and generates a JSON report of the diff operations.

replace-changed-text-using-diffoperation.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
replace-changed-text-using-diffoperation.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs, obtain DiffOperation objects, and replace the changed text on the second PDF with the original text using Aspose.Pdf's comparison and text extraction APIs.

compare-pdfs-log-differences.title: Compare Two PDFs and Log Differences
compare-pdfs-log-differences.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf and write each diff operation type with its page number to an audit log file.

compare-pdfs-generate-difference-pdf.title: Flat PDF Comparison with Difference Report
compare-pdfs-generate-difference-pdf.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, detect changes, and save a PDF that highlights the differences.

copy-pdf-metadata-to-diff-pdf.title: Copy PDF Metadata to Comparison Diff PDF
copy-pdf-metadata-to-diff-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and then copy all predefined and custom metadata from the source PDF to the diff PDF.

multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.title: Multi-Threaded PDF Comparison Using Aspose.Pdf
multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently by running each side‑by‑side comparison in its own Task and saving the result files.

parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Limited Concurrency
parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to compare a large batch of PDFs against a reference PDF in parallel while limiting the degree of parallelism to control memory consumption, and generates side‑by‑side comparison PDFs.

pdf-comparison-diff-images-zip.title: Generate PDF Comparison Diff Images and Zip Archive
pdf-comparison-diff-images-zip.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf, export the visual differences as PNG images, and package the images into a ZIP file for easy distribution.
